step.title: Load ready stories
step.action: Read all validated stories from docs/implementation-artifacts/stories/ that are ready for sprint planning.

step.title: Estimate and prioritize
step.action: Estimate effort for each story and prioritize based on dependencies and business value.

step.title: Select sprint scope
step.action: Select stories for the sprint based on team capacity and priority order.

step.title: Set sprint goals
step.action: Define clear sprint goals that align with the selected stories and epic objectives.

step.title: Produce sprint-status
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with sprint plan details.
